<?php namespace Illuminate\Auth\Middleware; use Closure; use Illuminate\Contracts\Auth\MustVerifyEmail; use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Redirect; use Illuminate\Support\Facades\URL; class EnsureEmailIsVerified { /** * Specify the redirect route for the middleware. * * @param string $route * @return string */ public static function redirectTo($route) { return static::class.':'.$route; } /** * Handle an incoming request. * * @param \Illuminate\Http\Request $request * @param \Closure $next * @param string|null $redirectToRoute * @return \Illuminate\Http\Response|\Illuminate\Http\RedirectResponse|null */ public function handle($request, Closure $next, $redirectToRoute = null) { if (! $request->user() || ($request->user() instanceof MustVerifyEmail && ! $request->user()->hasVerifiedEmail())) { return $request->expectsJson() ? abort(403, 'Your email address is not verified.') : Redirect::guest(URL::route($redirectToRoute ?: 'verification.notice')); } return $next($request); } }
